headline: Johnson & Johnson presents new IMAAVY® (nipocalimab-aahu) data at European Academy of Neurology (EAN) 2026 Congress reinforcing sustained disease control in generalized myasthenia gravis
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) today announced new data across 12 abstracts at the European Academy of Neurology (EAN) 2026 Congress that offer additional insight into the use of IMAAVY® (nipocalimab-aahu) throughout clinically relevant points in the generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) treatment journey. The analyses include adults with anti-AChRa or anti-MuSKb antibody-positive gMG who were early in their disease course or had lower baseline symptom burden – providing insight into the potential

headline: The Homebody Portfolio: How Much Does Retirement Cost When You Never Leave Chicago?
summary: What does retirement look like for someone who genuinely has no desire to leave home? No snowbird condo in Florida. No Viking river cruises. No RV parked outside Yellowstone. Just Chicago. The Cubs in the summer, the museums when the weather turns, dinner at the neighborhood Italian restaurant, church on Sunday, and grandchildren across town ... headline: The Portfolio That Buys You A New Car Every Three Years
summary: Most drivers replace their vehicles the same way: make payments for a few years, trade the car in, then start the cycle over again. A portfolio can break that cycle by generating enough income to fund future replacements.
